mapper.sql: id, projectId, projectType, memberRole, memberCode, memberName, phoneNum, email, fromFlag, createTime, createBy, updateTime, updateBy, effectiveTo, effectiveFrom
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_project_member (id, projectId, projectType, memberRole, memberCode, memberName, phoneNum, email, fromFlag, createTime, createBy, updateTime, updateBy, effectiveTo, effectiveFrom) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{projectId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{projectType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memberRole,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memberCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memberName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phoneNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fromFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_project_member
id,
projectId,
projectType,
memberRole,
memberCode,
memberName,
phoneNum,
email,
fromFlag,

mapper.update:
update pm_project_member
projectId = #{projectId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
projectType = #{projectType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
memberRole = #{memberRole,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
memberCode = #{memberCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
memberName = #{memberName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phoneNum = #{phoneNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
fromFlag = #{fromFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update pm_project_member set projectId = #{projectId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, projectType = #{projectType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, memberRole = #{memberRole,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, memberCode = #{memberCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, memberName = #{memberName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phoneNum = #{phoneNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, fromFlag = #{fromFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

trim.if: (m.effectiveTo is null or m.effectiveTo >= #{effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND

if.if: (m.effectiveTo is null or m.effectiveTo >= #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND

trim.if: ( m.projectType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or m.memberRole like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or m.memberCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or m.memberName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or m.phoneNum like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or m.email like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or m.fromFlag like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or m.createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or m.updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )

mapper.select:
select * from pm_project_member as m
m.id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
m.projectId = #{projectId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
m.projectType = #{projectType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
m.memberRole = #{memberRole, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
m.memberCode = #{memberCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
m.memberName = #{memberName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
m.phoneNum = #{phoneNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
m.email = #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
m.fromFlag = #{fromFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
m.createTime = #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
m.createBy = #{createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
m.updateTime = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
m.updateBy = #{updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
(m.effectiveTo is null or m.effectiveTo >= #{effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND
m.effectiveFrom <= #{effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND

select count(1) from pm_project_member as m
m.id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
m.projectId = #{projectId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
m.projectType = #{projectType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
m.memberRole = #{memberRole, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
m.memberCode = #{memberCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
m.memberName = #{memberName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
m.phoneNum = #{phoneNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
m.email = #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
m.fromFlag = #{fromFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
m.createTime = #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
m.createBy = #{createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
m.updateTime = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
m.updateBy = #{updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
(m.effectiveTo is null or m.effectiveTo >= #{effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND
m.effectiveFrom <= #{effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND

select m.*, bd.`basicDataName` as memberRoleName, ui.realName as createName from pm_project_member as m left join `fnd_basic_data` bd on bd.`dataTypeCode` = 'afProjectMember' and m.`memberRole` = bd.`basicDataId` left join t_user u on u.`user_name` = m.`createBy` left join t_user_info ui on ui.`user_id` = u.`user_id`
and ui.compID = #{model.orgId, jdbcType=INTEGER}
m.id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
m.projectId = #{model.projectId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
m.projectType = #{model.projectType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
m.memberRole = #{model.memberRole, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
m.memberCode = #{model.memberCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
m.memberName = #{model.memberName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
m.phoneNum = #{model.phoneNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
m.email = #{model.email, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
m.fromFlag = #{model.fromFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
m.createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
m.createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
m.updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
m.updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
(m.effectiveTo is null or m.effectiveTo >= #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND
m.effectiveFrom <= #{model.effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
( m.projectType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or m.memberRole like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or m.memberCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or m.memberName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or m.phoneNum like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or m.email like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or m.fromFlag like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or m.createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or m.updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )

select count(1) from pm_project_member as m
m.id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
m.projectId = #{model.projectId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
m.projectType = #{model.projectType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
m.memberRole = #{model.memberRole, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
m.memberCode = #{model.memberCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
m.memberName = #{model.memberName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
m.phoneNum = #{model.phoneNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
m.email = #{model.email, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
m.fromFlag = #{model.fromFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
m.createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
m.createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
m.updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
m.updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
(m.effectiveTo is null or m.effectiveTo >= #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND
m.effectiveFrom <= #{model.effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
( m.projectType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or m.memberRole like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or m.memberCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or m.memberName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or m.phoneNum like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or m.email like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or m.fromFlag like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or m.createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or m.updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
